outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Negative GEX (-16B total) amplifies all price movements. Expect accelerated moves on any directional break.
outlook.summary: Spot 651.99 sits between major support (645-650) and resistance (660). Deeply negative GEX across all expiries indicates dealers are short gamma, creating volatility amplification. 0DTE shows reverse_smirk (bullish) with extreme ATM put volume suggesting institutional hedging. Monthly PCR of 4.03 is extremely bearish - potential contrarian bounce signal. Max Pain cluster at 672-677 provides upward magnetic pull. Break above 660 targets 675 zone; failure at 645 accelerates to 630.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Dominant Put OI across ALL expiries (0DTE: 105,618 | Weekly: 65,757 | Monthly: 49,642). Total 220K+ OI. Structural floor with dealer gamma support. Negative market GEX makes this level crucial for volatility containment.
Near-spot support with massive 0DTE volume spike (286K vol vs 97K OI = 3x ratio). Institutional hedging detected. Strong OI in all expiries. Acts as primary intraday support zone.

Key resistance with Call OI (0DTE: 50,406 | Weekly: 3,823 | Monthly: 6,054) plus massive Put OI creating gamma friction. 0DTE volume 143K suggests active testing. Break needed for upside continuation.
Max Pain cluster center (0DTE: 675 | Weekly: 672 | Monthly: 677). MM target zone 3.5% above spot. Negative GEX environment accelerates moves toward this level once 660 breaks.
Secondary structural support with significant OI in 0DTE (74,296) and Monthly (69,075). Failure at 645 targets this level. High IV (16-23%) indicates fear pricing.
Weekly (12,353) and Monthly (13,338) Call concentration. Upper boundary of current range. Extreme negative GEX makes this a volatility cap zone.
Monthly deep support with highest single-strike Put OI (90,863). Monthly smirk skew (1.33) confirms institutional put protection. Last line of defense before structural breakdown.
